stemHtml: Consider that the angle of attack of a swept-back fin in a sideslip is increased. What happens to the static directional stability?

options.a: The fin will stall earlier due to the sweep angle but will also reduce the directional stability.
options.b: The fin will stall later due to the sweep angle but will increase the directional stability.
options.c: The fin will stall later due to the sweep angle but will also reduce the directional stability.
options.d: The fin will stall earlier due to the sweep angle but will increase the directional stability.
